posts.tag: Official News - ARD OAUTHC Indefinite Strike Day 2
posts.title: ARD OAUTHC ON STRIKE - DAY 2
posts.body:
Imagine working through the night, attending emergencies, managing critically ill patients, and making life-saving decisions for over 24 hours—while hungry, exhausted, and understaffed.

This is the reality many resident doctors face.

Our demands are simple:

🍽️ Provide call meals for all doctors on call.

👨‍⚕️ Address the severe manpower shortage that has resulted in increasing workload and burnout across departments.

🎓 Abolish bench duty fees imposed on resident doctors from accredited private teaching institutions.

Doctors cannot continue to shoulder increasing responsibilities without adequate welfare support.

We work all night.

We save lives.

We deserve to eat.

Supporting healthcare workers means protecting patients and strengthening healthcare delivery.

posts.title: ARD OAUTHC ON STRIKE
posts.body: HUNGRY DOCTORS SHOULD NOT BE CARING FOR CRITICALLY ILL PATIENTS

posts.title: ARD OAUTHC ON INDEFINITE STRIKE
posts.body:
Resident doctors provide emergency care, manage critically ill patients, perform life-saving interventions, and remain on duty throughout the night. 

Yet many doctors on call are not provided call meals.

posts.title: DAY 5 OF INDEFINITE STRIKE
posts.body:
Five days into our indefinite strike, our position remains unchanged because the issues remain unresolved.

This action is not about confrontation. It is about ensuring that resident doctors can work under conditions that support safe, effective, and sustainable healthcare delivery.

Our demands remain straightforward:

• Immediate provision of call meals for all doctors on call.

• Urgent action to address the severe manpower shortage across departments.

• Abolition of bench duty fees for resident doctors from accredited private teaching institutions.

• Upgrade and reallocation of resident doctors' quarters.

• Payment of all applicable allowances due to resident doctors.

When doctors are overworked, unsupported, and stretched beyond their limits, the entire healthcare system feels the impact.

We remain committed to constructive engagement and hope that these legitimate welfare concerns will receive the urgent attention they deserve.

We work all night. We save lives. We deserve to be supported—not ignored.



\#ARDOAUTHC #DoctorsWelfareMatters #CallMealsNow #EndTheManpowerCrisis #PatientCareMatters #SaveOAUTHC

posts.title: Day 6 of indefinite strike
posts.body:
**DAY 6 OF THE INDEFINITE STRIKE**



Six days on, our resolve remains unshaken.



We are not asking for privileges—we are demanding the basic conditions necessary for doctors who work tirelessly to keep the health system functioning. A healthcare system cannot thrive when those who sustain it are neglected.



Our demands remain clear:



• Immediate reversal of the payment requirement for staff ID cards. ID cards are institutional property and should not be financed by employees.

• Total discontinuation of bench duty fees imposed on resident doctors from accredited private teaching institutions.

• Immediate payment of all outstanding allowances and implementation of all due upgrades for doctors.

• Renovation and allocation of decent residential quarters for resident doctors.



History has shown that lasting solutions are built through wisdom, justice, and sincere dialogue—not intimidation. True leadership listens, engages, and acts in the interest of both healthcare workers and the patients they serve.



Our demands are fair. Our cause is just. Our resolve is unwavering.



We remain open to genuine and constructive engagement, but we will not be silenced or intimidated in our pursuit of dignity, fairness, and better healthcare for all.



Aluta Continua. Victoria Ascerta.



\#ARDOAUTHC  #StopExtortingUs #PatientCareMatters #SaveOAUTHC
